title: Bow+
description: Add two kinds of Bows, Umbrella bows and Ancient bows.
body:
I changed the bow texture to an umbrella in 1.0v.
In 3.0v,I changed the bow texture to an ancient bow.
Thanks for my supporters, I will do my best!
Vistie my Youtube Channel[My Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@DoggyEatSushi)
